questions.question: What are the 6 components every business email should have?
options: Subject, greeting, opening, body, action item, closing
To, from, date, subject, message, signature
Hello, introduction, request, thanks, goodbye, name
Header, footer, content, images, links, attachments

questions.question: What's the ideal subject line formula for business emails?
options: Make it as short as possible
Just write what the email is about

questions.question: When is the BEST time to send a follow-up email after no response?
What's the '3-Sentence Rule' for business emails?
options: Every email must be exactly 3 sentences long
If you can't explain it in 3 sentences, you need a meeting not an email

questions.question: When addressing a customer complaint, what should come FIRST in your email?
options: An explanation of what went wrong
Empathy and acknowledgment of their frustration

questions.question: What's the estimated time savings per week using ChatGPT for business communication (according to the module)?
For meeting notes, what's the MOST important section to include?
options: Action items with person responsible and due date

questions.question: What's the recommended approach for emotional emails (when you're upset)?
options: Send immediately while emotions are fresh
Have ChatGPT draft it, save as draft, review in 24 hours
Write it yourself without AI help

questions.question: When requesting budget approval from an executive, what should you focus on?
What's a common mistake when writing business emails?
options: Burying the lead (not getting to the point quickly)
